component.name: BytecodeLens
component.summary: The Java RE cockpit — decompile, attach, diff, patch

description.p: BytecodeLens is a modern desktop reverse-engineering workbench for Java and JVM bytecode. It combines four decompilers (CFR, Vineflower, Procyon, and an ASM-based fallback) with an Auto chain that falls through on failure, so you never see a blank tab. Open any .jar, .war, .class, .zip, or .jmod file and browse it through a clean multi-panel UI.

ul.li: Four decompilers with automatic fallback and a side-by-side Compare tab
Live JVM attach with a 9-tab inspector — heap, threads, CPU, deadlocks, hot-reload
Industrial hex viewer with Wireshark-style structure overlay for .class / ZIP / PNG
11 mapping formats (ProGuard, Tiny v1/v2, SRG, XSRG, TSRG, TSRG v2, CSRG, JOBF, Enigma, Recaf)
11 + 2 deobfuscation passes — dead code removal, opaque predicates, Kotlin data class restoration, enum name recovery, and more
Headless CLI for batch decompile / analyze / mapping conversion that skips the JavaFX runtime
Full Settings window with live-apply across 13 sections

screenshot.caption: Main window with project tree, decompiled view, and class info
